description: Crafted from 92% cotton and 8% spandex fabric, this high coverage brassiere from enamor is designed with a bottom panel that provides extra lift with a cut that offers exemplary comfort making it perfect for the confident you. Ideal for support through the day.Made of breathable stretch cotton/spandex fabric for enhanced comfortBottom panel that provides extra lift, perfect shaping and styleBeautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretchPrinted label for abrasion-free comfortWash careHand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or ironDrip dry in shade Owing to the intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
